query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name IN ('Brett Hansen', 'Ryan Pemberton', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
AND u.role = 'user'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
